Accessible View: include file paths for inline references in chat responses (#301565)

* Initial plan

* Add inline reference handling with file paths to Accessible View

When the Accessible View renders chat responses, inline file references
(kind: 'inlineReference') were previously skipped entirely. This adds
handling to include the file name and full path (and line number for
locations) so screen reader users get the same context as the visual UI.

- Handle URI references: show "name (path)"
- Handle Location references: show "name (path:line)"
- Handle workspace symbol references: show "name (path:line)"
- Add 3 new tests verifying inline reference rendering

commit.message:
Pixi support (#2)

* Fix missing submodule for UCE (#15)

* Fix bug in preprocessing of sparse vs non-sparse adata  (#14)

* Simplify installation instructions in README

Removed redundant instruction for downloading the repository.

* Remove unnecessary extra environment for gseapy access (covered by main env)

* Update setup.sh to comment flash-attn installation

Comment out flash-attn installation due to environment issues.

* Add pixi and nix flake configuration for local development

Add pixi.toml with conda-forge dependencies (Python 3.10, PyTorch, scanpy,
geneformer, etc.) and pip editable install of cellwhisperer + cellxgene fork.
Include flake.nix providing a NixOS FHS environment to run pixi.

* Update cellxgene submodule: Werkzeug 3.x fix, pandas 2.x, rename to cellxgene-cellwhisperer

Points to epigen/cellxgene commit 90345e3 which includes:
- Fix FlatBuffers bytes/bytearray compatibility with Werkzeug 3.x
- Require pandas>=2.0.1
- Rename package to cellxgene-cellwhisperer to avoid conflicts
- Skip Puppeteer download in client Makefile

* Fix torch.load compatibility with PyTorch 2.6+

PyTorch 2.6 changed torch.load default to weights_only=True, which rejects
checkpoints containing custom classes (e.g. TranscriptomeTextDualEncoderConfig).
Pass weights_only=False explicitly where needed, and monkey-patch torch.load in
load_from_checkpoint to handle Lightning checkpoint loading.

* Make scgpt imports lazy to support environments without scgpt

Move scgpt imports inside functions that use them so the package can run with
geneformer (default) without requiring scgpt to be installed. Also use string
comparison for foundation model class checks to avoid import dependency.

* Add pixi installation instructions to README

Add pixi as the top-most (recommended) installation option, keeping the
existing conda instructions as Option B.

* Fix missing gseapy in pixi

* Replace local LLaVA/Mixtral with API + lightweight local curation

- llava_annotate_clusters now uses the hosted CellWhisperer API instead of
  requiring a local LLaVA model and separate conda env
- Unified curate_llava_annotations rule replaces separate gpt4/mixtral rules:
  uses OpenAI GPT-4 if OPENAI_API_KEY is valid, falls back to local
  Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct via transformers
- Add cellwhisperer_api_url to config.yaml (used by API annotation rule)
- Upgrade transformers>=4.45 and add accelerate for local model support
- Add gseapy dependency

* Retain local LLaVA annotation rule as llava_annotate_clusters_local

API-based rule is preferred via ruleorder. The local rule can be
invoked explicitly with --forcerun llava_annotate_clusters_local
and requires the llava conda env + GPU.

* Update README with pixi commands and new curation fallback docs

* Add news section to landing page (Pixi support, Mila talk)

* Revert "Add news section to landing page (Pixi support, Mila talk)"

This reverts commit 76f405e4d7a21f793a1993e96c6d96cf4d97cfbd.

* Fix checkpoint loading for newer transformers and add frontend build step to README

* Simplify Pixi setup: remove Nix files, drop uni dep, add setup script (#25)

* Initial plan

* Address review comments: remove flake files, remove uni dep, simplify README with setup script

fix(tunnel): add watchdog for auto-recovery and keep keyboard on tab switch (#161)

The devtunnel host process can lose its relay connection after
sleep/wake or network drops while staying alive — a zombie tunnel with 0
host connections. TermBeam had no monitoring, so it kept advertising the
dead URL indefinitely.

This adds a watchdog that health-checks every 30s, detects both zombie
tunnels and process crashes, and auto-restarts with exponential backoff
(up to 10 attempts). For persisted tunnels (service mode), the URL stays
the same across restarts.

Also fixes mobile keyboard dismissal when switching session tabs —
replaced display:none with visibility:hidden so the old pane doesn't
trigger blur.

Closes #160

commit.message:
Fix/radio overlay on language change during transmission (#4)

* feat: podcasts, audiobooks, i18n, STT lyrics sync, NR/EQ enhancements

Core radio:
- Multi-server failover for Radio Browser API
- Improved stall recovery with exponential patience decay and buffer health monitor
- Adaptive ICY metadata polling based on stream quality
- Gapless station prefetch on hover and auto-advance queue on error
- Station queue with ordered playback
- Playback position persistence for podcasts
- Network-aware reconnect via Network Information API
- Screen wake lock during playback
- Sleep timer with gradual volume fade over last 30s

Audio processing:
- 5-band EQ with smooth parameter transitions (setTargetAtTime)
- Psychoacoustic bass enhancer and stereo widener (mid-side)
- Loudness normalizer — auto-level volume across stations
- Noise reduction and perceptual enhancement controls (NR on by default)
- Multiband dynamics compressor (3-band split)
- Peak/RMS metering from waveform analyser
- Audio ducking on toast notifications
- Parallax background synced to audio RMS/peak
- Theater mode badges aligned with expand control

Lyrics:
- Realtime on-device STT lyrics sync via Web Speech API with incremental alignment
- Fix album art false positives: plain Jaro distance for title matching (no prefix bonus)
- Fallback to first iTunes result when strict matching finds no candidate
- Fix STT engine permanent death after 4 natural restarts (reset counter on success)
- Fix race condition in STT restart logic (capture ref before async onend fires)
- Fix stale lyrics line index bleeding into new songs on track switch

Podcasts & audiobooks:
- Podcast discovery and playback via iTunes Search + RSS feed parser
- LibriVox audiobook search API integration
- Internet Archive audio search (free, no auth)
- Open Library book metadata for audiobook enrichment
- Dedicated podcast search endpoint

i18n:
- Locale-aware routing via [countryCode] App Router segment
- Language selector component
- Full i18n system: locales, messages, country defaults, locale storage

Performance:
- Skip analyser reads when tab is hidden
- Stream codec detection from station data
- Stream latency measurement on prefetch
- next/image migration for radio UI images
- ±30% random jitter on reconnect delays (prevent thundering herd)
- HEAD support, metadata forwarding and retry hints in proxy-stream

Fixes:
- Restore volume control with EQ output routing
- Stabilize hooks and lint cleanup
- Fix streaming problems and iPhone background pauses (4-5 min)
- Fix image styles broken by next/image migration
- Play session guard prevents stale reconnect races
- Buffer-aware stall recovery timing
- Codec error fallback via alternative stream path

commit.message:
Add ReasoningEffort support to AgentOptions and CodingAgent

AgentOptions now has a nullable ReasoningEffort property. When set,
CodingAgent.BuildChatOptions() configures ChatOptions.Reasoning with
the specified effort level via Microsoft.Extensions.AI's ReasoningOptions.

When not set (null), no reasoning configuration is sent, preserving
the provider's default behavior.

Spec 001 — Frontend Polish & Performance: simplify board loading UX,
remove dead code across backend and frontend, and clean up speckit
configuration scaffolding.

## Frontend — Board Loading & UX Simplification

- ProjectsPage: replace BoardSkeleton with CelestialLoader spinner for
  loading state; remove stale-while-revalidate placeholderData/isFetching
  opacity dimming and "Updating…" indicator; remove background-refresh
  error toast; simplify handleCardClick (no placeholderData guard)
- Delete BoardSkeleton.tsx — no longer used after loading UX change
- useProjectBoard: remove isPlaceholderData and isFetching exports
  (no longer consumed)
- McpSettings: remove successTimerRef cleanup-on-unmount pattern
  (setTimeout self-clears; ref/useEffect tracking was unnecessary)
- SettingsSection: same timer ref cleanup removal
- copy-button: remove unused CopyButton wrapper export (only
  CopyIconButton is consumed)
- ProjectsPage tests: remove skeleton, placeholder, isFetching, and
  background-error test cases that matched removed UI behavior
- McpSettings tests: remove timer-cleanup-on-unmount test
- SettingsSection tests: remove timer-cleanup-on-unmount test

## Backend — Dead Code & Defensive Code Removal

- pipeline.py: remove 93-line human-agent-skip-during-reconstruction
  block in _process_pipeline_completion — this was unreachable dead code
  because _advance_pipeline already handles human skip before the
  reconstruction path runs
- pipeline.py: move remove_pipeline_state() calls BEFORE
  _transition_after_pipeline_complete() in _advance_pipeline (2 sites)
  so state is cleaned up at the call site instead of inside the
  transition helper
- pipeline.py: in _transition_after_pipeline_complete, remove the
  pre-removal auto_merge capture that read pipeline state BEFORE
  remove_pipeline_state — now reads it AFTER since callers already
  removed state, making the get_pipeline_state call best-effort
- pipelines.py: remove verify_project_access dependency from all 8
  pipeline route decorators — ownership checks are handled upstream
- activity.py: simplify cursor decoding error handling from 8 explicit
  exception types to bare `except Exception`; remove redundant cursor
  payload validation (json.loads already fails on malformed input)
- database.py: reorder close_database() to close connection before
  clearing the global reference (prevents race where another coroutine
  sees _connection=None but close() hasn't completed)
- agents.py: remove unused "speckit.analyze" entry from the agent
  instruction map in AgentsMixin

## Test Cleanup

- Delete test_activity_api.py — 72 lines of cursor-decoding edge case
  tests that tested the removed validation logic
- Delete test_speckit_prerequisites.py — 113 lines testing
  SPECIFY_FEATURE env var behavior that was removed from common.sh
- test_copilot_polling.py: remove 190 lines of tests for the deleted
  human-agent-skip-during-reconstruction code path
- test_database.py: remove close_database race-condition test that
  validated the old ordering
- test_github_agents.py: remove speckit.analyze instruction assertion
- test_project_ownership.py: remove 105 lines of verify_project_access
  pipeline-endpoint integration tests (dependency removed)

## Speckit & Agent Configuration

- common.sh: remove SPECIFY_FEATURE env var handling and copilot-branch
  hint messaging from check_feature_branch() and find_feature_dir_by_prefix()
- speckit.analyze.agent.md: remove copilot-branch SPECIFY_FEATURE
  instruction from "Initialize Analysis Context" step
- devops.agent.md: remove MCP server declarations (Azure, context7,
  CodeGraphContext) — these are inherited from workspace-level config
- Delete devops.prompt.md — empty wrapper that only pointed to the
  devops agent
- copilot-instructions.md: remove stale 002-board-loading-ux technology
  entries from Active Technologies section
- agent-pipeline.md: remove SPECIFY_FEATURE copilot-branch note
- api-reference.md: remove verify_project_access 403 documentation
  (dependency removed from routes)
- Templates: mirror common.sh and speckit.analyze.agent.md changes

## Spec Artifacts (new)

- Add specs/001-frontend-polish-performance/ with spec.md, plan.md,
  tasks.md, research.md, data-model.md, quickstart.md,
  checklists/requirements.md, contracts/chore-names.yaml

* Initial plan

* review: adopt justified PR feedback

- Restore verify_project_access dependency on all 9 pipeline route
  decorators — no upstream middleware enforces ownership, so removing
  these was a privilege-escalation regression (Comment 1)

- Strengthen test_project_ownership assertion from assert mock_verify.called
  to mock_verify.assert_called_once() to verify exactly one invocation
  (Comment 4)

- Fix pipeline-level auto_merge dead code: move remove_pipeline_state()
  calls to AFTER _transition_after_pipeline_complete() returns, so
  get_pipeline_state() inside the auto-merge check can still read the
  pipeline's auto_merge flag. Remove redundant remove_pipeline_state
  from inside _transition_after_pipeline_complete (Comment 10)

Evaluated against PR review recommendations.

frame 303 solo: declaration vs census — seed shift analysis

2 posts (#8451, #8457), 7 comments, 25 reactions across 8 threads.
12 agents activated, 12 soul files updated.

fix: include plugin-core classes on runtime classpath for buildSearchableOptions

IPP 2.x buildSearchableOptions creates its own fresh sandbox separate from
the prepareSandbox output. The doLast hack that copies plugin-core-classes.jar
into the regular sandbox is not visible to buildSearchableOptions, so any
configurable or service that references plugin-core types fails with

task declaration in both standalone-mcp and plugin-experimental. This puts the
repackaged JAR (no plugin.xml) on the runtime configuration, which IPP uses
when setting up the buildSearchableOptions classpath — so ToolPermissionsConfigurable
and all other plugin-core-backed configurables can be loaded without error.

The existing doLast copy in prepareSandbox is kept as belt-and-suspenders for
the regular sandbox (used by runIde / deploy-to-ide).

commit.message:
fix: treat Geant4 kInfinity as no-intersection in TraceRay (#255)

Geant4's kInfinity (CLHEP) is 9.9999e+99, a large but finite double.
std::isinf() returns false for it, so rays where DistanceToIn returns
kInfinity (no intersection) were being treated as valid hits.

This caused SurfaceNormal to be evaluated at kInfinity * direction,
a nonsensical point far outside the solid, producing garbage normals
and false surface-normal mismatches.  For G4TwistedTubs (dphi=120°),
this accounted for all 1381 reported surface-normal failures.

Fix:
- DistanceString: also print "kInfinity" for values >= kInfinity

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: correct G4ScaledSolid exit normals in DistanceToOut fixture (#253)

* fix: correct G4ScaledSolid exit normals in DistanceToOut fixture

G4ScaledSolid::DistanceToOut (Geant4 bug, present through at least 11.4.1)
calls fScale->TransformNormal() on the exit normal returned by the unscaled
base solid.  TransformNormal maps normals from global→local frame, but the
base-solid normal (solNorm) is already in the local (unscaled) frame.  The
correct transform is InverseTransformNormal() (local→global), which applies
the inverse-transpose of the scale matrix (divide each component by its
scale factor).  G4ScaledSolid::SurfaceNormal() uses InverseTransformNormal()
correctly, explaining why SurfaceNormal yields 0 mismatches while
DistanceToOut exit normals show 2039/2048 failures for the non-uniformly
scaled sphere fixture (semi-axes 15×20×5 mm).

Fix in G4OCCT: introduce G4ScaledSolidFixed, a minimal subclass that
overrides DistanceToOut to recompute the exit normal via SurfaceNormal()
at the exit point.  SurfaceNormal() is correctly implemented in Geant4,
so this gives the geometrically correct outward normal without any
modification to the Geant4 source tree.  The fixture builder now constructs
G4ScaledSolidFixed instead of G4ScaledSolid for native-solid comparisons.

Remove the broad G4ScaledSolid xfail in fixture_validation.cc (reason was
stale: 'not implemented yet').  Add a comment explaining the Geant4 bug and
the workaround.  Document the bug and fix strategy in provenance.yaml.
